arabic:
وعن أبي موسى رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قلت‏:‏ يا رسول الله أي المسلمين أفضل‏؟‏ قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏من سلم المسلمون من لسانه ويده‏"‏‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Abu Musa Al-Ash'ari (May Allah be pleased with him) reported:
english.text: I asked the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ): "Who is the most excellent among the Muslims?" He said, "One from whose tongue and hands the other Muslims are secure.".

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
